110 - Use of Telehealth in Delivery of Home Health Services 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

Section 1895(e) governs the home health prospective payment system (PPS) and provides 
that telehealth services are outside the scope of the Medicare home health benefit and 
home health PPS.
